biological_replicate: All four 55LCC components were required for viability across several cell lines...

experimental_design: 55LCC complex role in replication fork progression
The 55LCC complex is required for replication fork progression, sister chromatid cohesion, and chromosome stability.
factor_value: These data indicate that SPATA5, SPATA5L1, C1orf109, and CINP exist as a stable complex (55LCC) in cells.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
number_of_technical_replicates: Cells were seeded at 300 and 500 cells per well in 6-well plates (technical triplicates)...
